params.name: Konjaku Tale
params.description:
On Sept 13, 1077 AD, the compilation of the Konjaku Tale was completed.
Konjaku Tale is a collection of stories written by a high government official in ancient times. The book consists of thirty-one volumes, which records more than a thousand legends. These are divided into two parts: Buddhist and secular stories. The latter includes anecdotes of historical figures, moral fables, and folklore that each touch on pragmatic life lessons. This book provides important insight into the life and ti …
